status.next_allowed_action: Stage 4 execution complete; no remaining work units.

new_dependency_whitelist_runtime: chokidar (only if fs.watch recursive proven unreliable; record evidence)
execution_rules.toolchain_devdeps_allowed: typescript/vite/tsx/concurrently and @types/* reusing workbench-pinned versions do NOT count as new dependencies
execution_rules.privacy_check_every_commit: git diff --cached must not contain /Users/ paths; never commit demo-KB generated graph-data/offline HTML
execution_rules.browser_file_url_acceptance_can_use_loca: When a plan step asks for file:// automated browser acceptance, a local temporary HTTP address serving only the artifact directory is allowed as the automation transport; this does not change the offline double-click product acceptance target.

decision_log.evidence: rg over templates/graph-styles/wash/header.html, graph-wash.js, and graph-wash-helpers.js for d3/rough/script-loader terms only matched the graph-data JSON script tag; no d3 or rough runtime usage was found.
decision_log.consequence: Phase 6 can remove d3.min.js and rough.min.js from offline HTML packing if no later dependency appears; marked and DOMPurify remain outside this conclusion.

decision_log.evidence: scripts/init-wiki.sh writes a knowledge-base .gitignore containing only .wiki-tmp/; it creates .wiki-cache.json but does not ignore it.
decision_log.consequence: .wiki-graph-layout.json should align with .wiki-cache.json as a knowledge-base asset and remain not ignored; no init-wiki.sh code change was made in WU 3.3.

decision_log.decision: Native Node fs.watch recursive was kept; chokidar was not introduced.
decision_log.evidence: Two temporary-directory probes on darwin received recursive events for nested directory creation and nested markdown file create/modify/delete. The second probe showed nested file modifications may arrive as rename events rather than change, so the implementation treats any non-excluded event as a rebuild signal and does not depend on event type.
decision_log.consequence: WU 5.1 uses Node native fs.watch recursive with debounce and explicit path exclusions; no new dependency was added.

decision_log.decision: Automated browser acceptance may use a local temporary HTTP address in place of file://.
decision_log.evidence: User explicitly amended the plan to allow local temporary HTTP addresses as a substitute for file:// automated browser acceptance.
decision_log.consequence: Future browser automation can serve only the artifact directory over a temporary localhost URL; offline double-click HTML remains a product acceptance target.

decision_log.decision: Drag feel parameters finalized for Stage 4.
decision_log.evidence: packages/graph-engine/src/sim/index.ts defaults: coldStartAlpha 0.08, lowHeatAlphaTarget 0.15, alphaMin 0.003, alphaDecay 0.14, velocityDecay 0.58; forceManyBody strength -34 distanceMax 220; forceX/Y strength 0.052; forceCollide strength 0.64 iterations 2. Drag behavior keeps direct neighbors live, freezes far nodes during drag, and sets alphaTarget to 0 on release.
decision_log.consequence: These values are the WU 7.1 finalized interaction defaults. Subjective hand-feel remains pending reviewer judgment per manual acceptance rules.

evidence: Existing current-repo npm run dev process chain was active; backend /api/knowledge-bases and frontend root both responded over localhost.
bash tests/regression.sh: All regression checks passed
1_monorepo_dev_and_skill_tests.summary: Root dev services from the current repository responded, Skill-side tests and regressions passed, and the workspace plus shared graph engine checks remained green.

2_static_baseline_screenshots.summary: Workbench graph screenshots and legacy offline HTML baseline screenshot are committed for reviewer comparison. Codex does not self-certify final visual equivalence.

3_pinning_persistence.summary: Node pinning, layout persistence, corrupted layout tolerance, refresh restoration, and community-stable drag behavior have evidence. Drag hand-feel remains pending reviewer judgment per manual acceptance rules.

4_selection_closed_loop.summary: Structured selection tests, selection panel/capsule prompt flow, new-conversation handoff, capabilities pruning without onAsk, and Browser DOM assertion for chat-to-graph focus all passed.

evidence: npm test -w @llm-wiki/graph-engine: 116 tests passed, including GraphDiffQueue visible/hidden/dragging/folding scenarios
node --import tsx --test workbench/server/src/*.test.ts workbench/server/src/digest/*.test.ts: 19 tests passed, including batch suspend/resume and rebuild queue coverage

Browser motion check: data-diff-state playing with diff classes, then settled with classes cleared

5_growth_and_watcher.summary: Phase 5 watcher, diff, queue, and growth-animation path passed automated tests and Browser DOM verification. Batch rebuild suspension is covered by server tests; no chokidar was added.

evidence: Real Chromium Playwright local HTTP check passed for render, baked pin, reader, drag, localStorage persistence after reload, and zero ask buttons
bash tests/regression.sh: All regression checks passed
6_offline_html.summary: Offline HTML now uses the shared graph engine single-file output; automated render, pinning, localStorage persistence, no-ask capability, migrated regression suite, typecheck, and graph-engine tests all passed.

evidence: In-app Browser DOM assertion: dark workbench rendered graphStatus ready, graphTheme mo-ye, engineTheme mo-ye, 11 nodes, 24 edges, --bg #0d0f0e, --ink #f5f0e6, --cinnabar #e45d4a
7_theme_follow.summary: Mo-ye dark theme token follow and rendered graph state have automated evidence plus a committed screenshot. Visual harmony remains pending reviewer judgment.

manual_acceptance.item: Static graph visual consistency against legacy offline HTML.
manual_acceptance.reason: Visual consistency is subjective per plan; screenshots are provided for the reviewer instead of Codex self-approval.

verification.command: In-app Browser DOM assertion and screenshot
verification.summary: Workbench graph rendered in dark mode with graphTheme/engineTheme mo-ye, 11 nodes, 24 edges, and expected mo-ye tokens --bg #0d0f0e, --ink #f5f0e6, --cinnabar #e45d4a; screenshot saved to docs/plans/stage-4-artifacts/p7-moye-theme.png for reviewer judgment.
Rebuilt ESM/IIFE outputs so Browser verification used the updated mo-ye tokens.
server, web, and graph-engine workspace typechecks passed; web pretypecheck rebuilt graph-engine outputs.
116 graph-engine tests passed, including updated mo-ye token assertions and live simulation drag behavior tests.

verification.command: git diff --cached --check; staged added-line privacy scan; root package type check; scripts/build-graph-data.sh diff check; staged artifact path check
verification.summary: Whitespace check passed; staged added lines contained no local absolute paths; root package.json still has no type field; scripts/build-graph-data.sh was unchanged; no graph-data/offline HTML generated artifacts were staged.

work_units.notes: Polished mo-ye toward black background, white ink, and cinnabar accent; added dark-specific renderer styling for background, edges, community wash, nodes, minimap, and reader surfaces. Drag feel defaults are recorded in decision_log. Screenshot evidence is committed; visual harmony and hand-feel remain pending reviewer judgment.

work_units.name: 七条总验收取证 + PRODUCT.md/设计文档回填

verification.command: current-repo npm run dev smoke via existing process chain and curl
verification.summary: Frontend and backend dev processes were running from the current repository; backend knowledge-bases endpoint and frontend root both responded.
116 tests passed.
All regression checks passed.
server, web, and graph-engine workspace typechecks passed; web pretypecheck rebuilt graph-engine outputs.
116 graph-engine tests passed.
ESM and IIFE graph-engine builds completed.
No pending implementation markers remained in PRODUCT.md/stage-4-design; TBD-4.1 and TBD-4.2 are marked as finalized.

work_units.notes: Backfilled PRODUCT.md and stage-4-design.md with Stage 4 completion status, final implementation decisions, resolved TBDs, self-generated watcher exclusions, and final acceptance evidence. Subjective visual and hand-feel items remain in manual_acceptance for reviewer judgment.

turn_log.action: Fast-forwarded ../llm-wiki-agent main to stage-4-design for subtree readiness.
turn_log.verification: git -C ../llm-wiki-agent log main --oneline -3 showed a69fa9b, 1e1811c, and ab419ca.
turn_log.next: WU 0.2 subtree add into workbench plus privacy scrub.

turn_log.action: Added ../llm-wiki-agent main as workbench/ using git subtree, then scrubbed user-home path examples from imported workbench files.
turn_log.verification: workbench/docs/stage-4-design.md exists; subtree merge commit 510eb9f links to agent parent a69fa9b; grep for user-home path examples in workbench md/ts/tsx/json returned no matches.

turn_log.action: Set up the monorepo workspace root and moved workbench root package and Node config to the repository root.
turn_log.verification: npm install, dev smoke curl checks, JS tests, Codex install dry-run, typecheck, environment check, and regression all passed.

turn_log.action: Scaffolded the shared graph-engine package with types, package scripts, Vite dual-format build config, and placeholder engine lifecycle API.
turn_log.verification: graph-engine build produced ESM and IIFE outputs; root typecheck passed across server, web, and graph-engine.
turn_log.next: WU 1.2 helpers TypeScript port and test migration.

turn_log.action: Ported graph-wash helpers into graph-engine TS model modules and migrated matching helper tests.
turn_log.verification: graph-engine tests passed with 82 migrated helper tests; old-to-new test case count stayed 82 to 82; graph-engine build, root typecheck, and original JS tests passed.
turn_log.next: Phase 1 done; WU 2.1 static renderer and theme tokens.

turn_log.action: Implemented the graph-engine static renderer, renderable graph mapping, shan-shui and mo-ye theme token modules, and wired createGraphEngine to mount, render, theme, focus, select, and destroy a static atlas.
turn_log.verification: graph-engine tests passed with 92 tests; graph-engine build passed; root typecheck passed; header.html/graph-wash d3/rough audit found no d3 or rough runtime usage; staged privacy scan found no local absolute paths.
turn_log.next: WU 2.2 workbench graph view shell, graph API/rebuild flow, and static baseline evidence.

turn_log.action: Added the workbench graph view shell, graph API/rebuild flow, SSE graph events, demo KB graph evidence, and Phase 2 screenshot artifacts.
turn_log.verification: API rebuild script passed with 11 nodes and 24 edges; Playwright confirmed rendered graph and building state; typecheck, web build, graph-engine test/build, original JS tests, and regression all passed; staged privacy and root package type checks passed.
turn_log.next: Phase 2 done; WU 3.1 d3-force low-heat simulation, hybrid layout, and path caching.

turn_log.action: Added d3-force live simulation, low-heat drag behavior, cold-start coordinate handling, render position updates, and stable edge curve caching in graph-engine.
turn_log.verification: graph-engine tests passed with 95 tests; graph-engine build passed; root typecheck passed; workbench web build passed; Playwright smoke confirmed live graph coordinates in the workbench; staged privacy and root package type checks passed.
turn_log.next: WU 3.2 node pinning, layout API, and KB-local layout persistence.

turn_log.action: completed WU 3.2 and advanced to WU 3.3
verification: layout API roundtrip and damaged-file tolerance passed

turn_log.action: completed WU 3.3, marked Phase 3 done, and advanced to Phase 4 WU 4.1
verification: browser drag DOM assertion passed with evidence artifact
turn_log.next: WU 4.1 selection modes, structural facts, and action mapping.

turn_log.action: completed
turn_log.summary: Implemented graph-engine structured selection with structural facts and action mapping, verified with graph-engine tests, workspace typecheck, graph-engine build, and staged safety scans.

turn_log.action: completed
turn_log.summary: Implemented selection panel UI, capsule prompt flow, and new-conversation handoff; verified with template tests, graph-engine tests, typecheck, web build, Browser evidence, and new-conversation API assertion.

turn_log.action: completed
turn_log.summary: Implemented chat-to-graph focus highlighting and capabilities pruning validation; Browser DOM assertion confirmed a wiki link in chat focused the matching graph node.

turn_log.action: completed
turn_log.summary: Implemented active knowledge-base file watching, generated-artifact exclusions, batch digest suspend/resume, and a single-flight rebuild queue.
verification: native fs.watch recursive probe passed on darwin without adding chokidar

turn_log.action: completed
turn_log.summary: Implemented graph diff calculation with community alignment and upgraded graph_updated events to include real diffs after rebuild.
verification: graph-engine tests passed with 111 tests, including all six required diff fixtures

turn_log.action: completed WU 5.3, marked Phase 5 done, and advanced to Phase 6 WU 6.1
turn_log.summary: Implemented living atlas growth animation, testable diff queue state machine, hidden graph badge/replay flow, drag-aware queuing, and reduced-motion direct settling.
verification: web build passed on serial rerun after a transient parallel declaration-build race
Browser reduced-motion and motion checks passed
Browser hidden-graph growth replay scenario passed with two animated added nodes and 3s settle
temporary demo KB files removed and graph-data rebuilt clean

turn_log.action: blocked
turn_log.summary: Implemented the offline HTML conversion toward shared graph-engine output and passed script/build/typecheck/demo-generation checks, but stopped before commit because the required Browser file:// verification was blocked by Browser Use URL policy.
verification: demo KB graph-data and offline HTML generation passed
generated HTML uses shared engine, embeds graph-layout, has no sourceMappingURL tail comments, and removed old external graph-wash/d3/rough/marked/purify assets
Browser plugin file:// verification blocked by Browser Use URL policy
turn_log.next: User amended the plan to allow local temporary HTTP automated Browser verification when file:// is blocked.

turn_log.action: plan amended
turn_log.summary: Updated the Phase 6.1 plan and progress ledger so automated Browser verification may use a local temporary HTTP address serving only the generated output directory when file:// is blocked.
turn_log.next: Run WU 6.1 verification through the local temporary HTTP fallback, then commit only if all checks pass.

turn_log.action: completed
turn_log.summary: Converted the Skill offline HTML builder to emit a shared graph-engine single-file page with baked layout pins, localStorage pin persistence, built-in reader mode, and no ask action. The plan was amended to permit local temporary HTTP Browser automation when file:// is blocked.
verification: demo KB graph-data and offline HTML generation passed
Browser local HTTP render check passed with storage API limitation recorded
real Chromium Playwright local HTTP check passed for render, baked pin, reader, drag, localStorage persistence after reload, and zero ask buttons

turn_log.action: completed WU 6.2, marked Phase 6 done, and advanced to Phase 7 WU 7.1
turn_log.summary: Migrated Skill-side graph HTML regressions to the new engine output, preserved oriental design semantic assertions, deprecated the legacy wash template and old helper tests, and kept unrelated untracked files untouched.

turn_log.action: plan amended
turn_log.summary: Updated the global browser-evidence rule so file:// automated browser acceptance may be replaced by a local temporary HTTP address serving only the artifact directory.
verification: plan grep confirmed the local temporary HTTP rule is present

turn_log.action: completed WU 7.1 and advanced to WU 7.2
turn_log.summary: Polished the mo-ye dark theme, saved dark-mode graph evidence, finalized drag feel parameters in decision_log, and kept subjective visual/hand-feel acceptance pending reviewer judgment.
verification: In-app Browser DOM assertion passed for dark mo-ye graph with 11 nodes and 24 edges and updated theme tokens

turn_log.action: completed WU 7.2, marked Phase 7 done, and completed Stage 4
